chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP D 5778 2024 _______________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.1248/205. 2. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 20.02.2025 Mr. Rasheed Ashraf Mughal, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Prayer clause in petition reads as follows: “i) To declare that actions of respondent No.4 without issuing any letter for resumption and without giving fair opportunity of hearing to the Petitioner, are illegal, arbitrary, ab-initio void and of no legal effect; ii) To direct the respondent No.4 not to dispossess the Petitioner from subject land without due process of law; iii) To direct the respondent No.4 to place the entire record before this Honourable Court in respect of allotments of lands in Na-Class No.344 of Deh Joreji; iv) To direct the respondent No.4 or concerned authority not to allot subject land to any other person tlll the decision of present lis; v) Any other relief, which this Honourable Court may deem just and proper also be awarded.” Prima facie this is a factual controversy and rights are being asserted in immovable property. Even otherwise, entire claim of the petitioner is rested premise, conjecture and / or apprehension. This petition is found prima facie to be misconceived and the same is dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
